name: Ross Stores
analysis: ROST has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $231.2018. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $231.7157 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $231.2018, stop $219.3499, target $235.0192. Risk/reward is 0.32:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
